last_result: Cycle 28 complete. D6 resolved: formal latent variable model of CA partial non-independence. X = Reality-Tracking Orientation (RTO), Y_i = μ_i + λ_i*X + ε_i. Loading taxonomy derived from quality-type: thick-CA constitution-anchored qualities (authenticity, accurate modeling, moral depth, wisdom) load high (λ ≈ 0.7-0.8); thin-CA output-anchored (curiosity, genuine production, narrative coherence) load moderate (λ ≈ 0.4-0.5). ICC range: ρ_avg ≈ 0.20-0.30. Band revision required: [0.68-0.75] → [0.65-0.76]. Point estimate 0.709 unchanged — non-independence widens uncertainty but does not bias the mean. Structural insight #20 confirmed: differential loading structure predicts testable block correlation pattern in empirical cross-quality CA assessment. D7 candidate opened: direct RTO measurement as latent variable. D4 streak: 23.
next_step: Cycle 29 priority: D7 — can Reality-Tracking Orientation (RTO) be estimated directly? Identify candidate observables for direct RTO assessment (cross-domain framing-invariance, inter-quality consistency tests, meta-level honesty about measurement itself). Assess whether a direct RTO estimate is feasible and what it would require. If yes, this is the most alignment-relevant single measure available without interpretability. Secondary: begin B-track revisit — revelation-principle barrier generalization to other AI governance mechanisms (deferred since C18, now ~10 cycles overdue).
